form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Better than last run and looks set to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Better than last run and looks set to run well.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last on March 31 over 410m at Horsham behind Kaelix Storm beaten 15 lengths (24.21) in a Mix 6/7. Not keen this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last on March 31 over 410m at Horsham behind Kaelix Storm beaten 15 lengths (24.21) in a Mix 6/7. Not keen this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Bendigo (24.13) in a Special conditions H, finishing a half a length second. Placed at all three starts from this draw. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at Bendigo (24.13) in a Special conditions H, finishing a half a length second. Placed at all three starts from this draw. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Lost ground turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 450m at this track. That followed a win two back in 24.58 beating Taltarni Blue over 425m at Bendigo. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 450m at this track. That followed a win two back in 24.58 beating Taltarni Blue over 425m at Bendigo. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 2 length second but did record an outstanding 25.21 over the 450m journey. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 2 length second but did record an outstanding 25.21 over the 450m journey. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (25.28) at this track over 450m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (25.28) at this track over 450m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Horsham over 410m. Has claims on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Horsham over 410m. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 2 over 450m at Warrnambool in a Mix 6/7 FIN. This looks too tough.

formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 2 over 450m at Warrnambool in a Mix 6/7 FIN. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 3.5 lengths behind Paw Kara over 390m. Looks tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 3.5 lengths behind Paw Kara over 390m. Looks tested in this company.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.75 lengths fifth (24.52) over 425m at Bendigo. Major threat on best form.
